title: Generate Test Cases with Single-Character Requirement Description (Min String Length)
description: Verifies that the system handles a requirement description containing exactly one character — the minimum non-empty string boundary — when generating test cases.
expected_result: The system either accepts the single-character input and generates structured test cases, or displays a clear inline validation message indicating a minimum character requirement (e.g., 'Description must be at least X characters'). The page does not crash or produce an unhandled error.

test_steps.action: Navigate to the test case generation page
test_steps.expected: The test case generation page loads successfully

test_steps.action: Click on the requirement description input field
Type a single character into the requirement description field
test_steps.expected: The single character 'A' is entered into the field

test_steps.action: Select a test case template from the dropdown
test_steps.expected: The template 'Functional Test Template' is selected

test_steps.action: Click the Generate Test Cases button
test_steps.expected: The system processes the request and either generates test cases or displays an appropriate minimum-length validation message
